definition: The draw-swap contract of the Web Graph standard — the second of its two renderer seams. A CustomGraphRenderer takes a PositionedGraph (coordinates from a CustomGraphLayout) plus resolved Web Theme tokens and produces output, never reading the GraphSpec directly. The native-first SVG default is the canonical impl; Cytoscape / sigma / canvas adapters swap in behind the same contract.
usage: Standardized by the CustomGraphRenderer Protocol (Web Graph).
